settings.heading: Not Your Average Brand
settings.body:
We're not just a swimwear and resort wear brand. We're a lifestyle brand celebrating the carefree spirit and endless possibilities of beachside living.

Our goal is simple: to bring joy and confidence with our vibrant and creative designs. Whether it's tropical patterns or bold cuts, every item in our lineup is crafted to stand out and encourage our customers to express themselves freely.

settings.heading: Designed for life in the sun
settings.col1_text: From Phuket to Koh Phangan, Bikini Booth is rooted in island life. Sunsets, sea breeze, and prints that feel like a holiday you can wear every day.
settings.col2_text: Swimwear and resort wear shaped for real bodies and real plans. Flattering lines, confident fits, and pieces that move with you from beach clubs to boardwalks.
settings.col3_text: We’re here for color, joy, and self-expression. The carefree energy you see on our site is the same spirit we stitch into every collection.
